response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified "徳音サイダー" (visually interpreted as Tokai Cider) at 00:00. 2. Identified "シル・ヴ・プレジデント" at 01:01. 3. Searched for both. The first song "Tokai Cider" lyrics were not easily retrievable, so those fields are set to null. 4. Successfully found lyrics for "Sil Vous President" and mapped them to the scene.
response.global_summary: A short video featuring Hololive virtual YouTubers performing covers of two songs, "Tokai Cider" and "Sil Vous President", separated by dialogue intervals.

scenes.description: The video starts with a performance of "Tokai Cider" with on-screen text in the corner.
